objective: Reduce MCP tool-schema surface area without breaking contracts.
steps: Inventory ``mcp/server.json`` + ``~/.cursor/mcp.json`` tool counts and serialized size.
Flag servers whose manifest JSON exceeds ~2000 tokens **after** local measurement (do not claim ratios without benchmarks).
Design ``get_tool_schema`` / ``invoke_tool`` shim (mcp-compressor-class) behind a feature flag.
defer: Rootless ``execute_script`` sandbox is a separate threat-model + CI harness — not implied here.
